plan_adjustments.summary: P1 shipped: isExported scope-boundary fix + isConstantValue widening (new_expression/array/object/call_expression/template_string/as_expression/satisfies_expression, ALL_CAPS-gated). Blast radius larger than estimated: const extraction surfaced 25 under-listing @exports headers + 9 newly-visible files (coverage transiently 86.86%). Remedied in-phase: surgical @exports restamp script (one line per file, derived from fresh index.json exported elements) + populate --source-headers for the 9. Final: stale 0, export_mismatch 0, coverage 99.27% (better than pre-fix 98.86%/stale-1). Element delta: +~80 constants (126 total, 30 exported); nested exported:true count now 0.

P1-T5 gate: 1613/1614 collected tests pass. scanner-export.test.ts recursive-option timeout in full run is the documented contention-flake victim (precedent 2026-06-12 morning) - isolated rerun 25/25 PASS. check-header-coverage.test.ts collection failure is STUB-Z1ETZD, THIS WO's Phase 2 target. Gate accepted PASS-with-notes.
